info.name: ML Demand Forecasting Platform API
info.description: Endpoints for the demand forecasting platform: upload datasets, train the model, get predictions, and check evaluation metrics.

request.description: Confirms the API is running and reports whether a model is currently loaded.
Upload a CSV dataset. Must have columns: date, store, product, price, promo, units_sold.
Retrains XGBoost on the given dataset (must already be cleaned/feature-engineered) and returns evaluation metrics.
Predict units sold for a given store, product, and date. `price` is optional — defaults to the historical average for that store/product.
Same as Predict, but with a promotion running — expect a higher predicted value.
Returns metrics from the most recent /train call, or falls back to the saved Day 6 notebook results.
